title: Add user id when creating an Item
excerpt:
Is there a way to add the user id to the Create Item mutation so when a new item is created via the v2 API it shows up on the CREATION LOG column with the user specified in the query/mutation. 
In the v1 API when a new p…

posts.author: renow (Frank R.)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to add the user id to the Create Item mutation so when a new item is created via the v2 API it shows up on the CREATION LOG column with the user specified in the query/mutation.

In the v1 API when a new pulse was created you had the option of sending a user id with what ever user you wanted.

posts.author: Ayelet (Ayelet Holtzman)
posts.cookedHtml:
hey @renow,
this is not possible with API v2 as we now only have personal tokens.
the user appearing in the creation log would be the user the token belongs to.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
